name: Band Standing Leg Curl
aliases: band one arm standing low row
shortDescription: A standing hamstring curl variation using resistance from a band for leg flexion.
instructions: Anchor a resistance band at ankle height behind you, securing the loop around your ankle. Stand upright and curl your heel toward your glutes, keeping the upper leg stationary, then return to the starting position under control.
steps: Anchor the resistance band behind you at ground level.
Loop the band around one ankle.
Stand on the opposite leg and balance.
Curl your heel toward your glutes by flexing your knee.
Lower leg slowly; repeat and switch sides.
breathing: Exhale as you curl, inhale as you return.
